## Accepted

- `fr-2-3ecddec9`

## Rejected

None.

## Disputed

## Final Accepted Amendments

### `fr-2-3ecddec9`

finding_summary: The new deprecation notice for `project select` points users at a replacement that is not behaviorally equivalent for bead-backed projects. `project select` still synchronizes the active milestone (`src/cli/project.rs:686-693`), but `task select` only updates the active project pointer (`src/cli/task.rs:96-100`). Milestone commands resolve the active milestone from the saved milestone pointer before falling back to the active project (`src/cli/milestone.rs:543-560`), so following the advertised replacement can leave the workspace on the wrong milestone and send later `milestone next` / `milestone run` / `milestone status` commands to the previously active milestone.
affected_files: src/cli/project.rs, src/cli/task.rs
remediation_hint: Make `task select` reuse the same selection helper as `project select`, including `sync_active_milestone_from_project_record`, and add a bead-backed integration test that asserts `task select` updates the active milestone as well as the active project.
